meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Accelerate Your Freelance Dev Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop slow development cycles. Learn how to optimize your workflow with Claude Code and Antigravity to ship SaaS projects faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and scaffold complex features. By setting up custom skill sets, you transform your CLI into a senior-level pair programmer, enabling you to iterate on client requirements in minutes instead of hours, effectively doubling your project throughput.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your sprint, your client is asking for progress, and you're still wrestling with local environment configurations and repetitive boilerplate code. The friction of manual coding isn't just killing your momentum; it's eating your profit margins and turning high-value consultancy into a grind.

But what if you could offload the cognitive load of syntax and architecture to an expert-level agent? By combining Claude Code's autonomous terminal capabilities with the structural precision of Antigravity, you can move from blank file to functional feature in a fraction of the time. It is time to stop typing and start orchestrating.

steps.title: Configure the Environment
steps.description: Establish a secure authentication bridge between Claude Code and your local workspace to enable file system access.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project directory and identify the primary tech stack and architecture pattern for a SaaS MVP.

steps.title: Define Project Skills
steps.description: Create a clear definition of your project requirements so the agent understands your specific coding standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a technical manifesto that enforces clean architecture, modular components, and strict TypeScript typing for this project.

steps.title: Automated Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the boilerplate files based on the structure defined in the previous step.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new feature module with API routes, database models, and unit tests based on the existing project architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Create a new feature module for user authentication using the existing service layer.'

steps.title: Continuous Testing Loop
steps.description: Integrate automated testing into your Claude Code workflow to ensure every feature is production-ready upon completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite for the new module that covers edge cases and integration points with the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Run the test suite and fix any failures found in the new module.'

steps.title: Deployment Optimization
steps.description: Prepare your code for production by streamlining the build process and checking for common deployment bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the project build configuration and suggest optimizations for faster deployment times and smaller bundle sizes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Check for build errors and optimize the project for deployment.'

pro_tips: Use a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from parsing massive lock files or sensitive environment variables, significantly reducing token consumption.
Chain your prompts by asking the agent to 'summarize the state of the codebase' every 30 minutes to keep its context window focused on the current task.
Leverage Antigravity to generate custom CLI aliases that trigger complex Claude Code workflows with a single keystroke.
Always instruct Claude Code to output 'Plan first' to force the model to outline its architectural approach before writing a single line of code.
Use the 'diff' mode in Claude Code to review proposed changes manually, ensuring high-stakes logic remains under your expert control.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully integrated Claude Code, start building a library of custom 'skill' configurations that you can copy-paste into new client repositories to save hours of setup time.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the editor and start owning the output. Elevate your freelance business by shipping faster than the competition. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
